title: Sulfonamide compounds beneficial in neuroprotective treatment
abstract: Disclosed are compounds of the formula (I) and pharmaceutically acceptable salts thereof: Formula (I) wherein Ring A, R 1 , R 2 , R 3 , R 4 and a are as defined herein. The compounds are antagonists of the resistant (R-type) voltage-gated calcium ion channel Cav 2.3. Also disclosed are pharmaceutical compositions comprising the compounds; and the compounds for use in the treatment of diseases modulated Cav 2.3, including epilepsy, neurodegenerative conditions such as Parkinson's disease, focal, drug-resistant forms of epilepsy, and other neurological disorders such as developmental and epileptic encephalopathies and Fragile X syndrome.
